title: EnergyResourceInverter
description: Typed schema for grid-connected power-electronics inverter energy resources (type = INVERTER). v1.1: ratedApparentPowerKva → ratedApparentPower, maxReactivePowerKvar → maxReactivePower, minReactivePowerKvar → minReactivePower (all QuantitativeValue); inherits EnergyResourceCommon/v1.1. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection (IEC 61970-302).

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. Must be "INVERTER". CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection (IEC 61970-302).

ratedApparentPower.description: Rated apparent power. Typical unit: KiloV-A. SunSpec Model 702 maxVA. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.ratedS. Replaces ratedApparentPowerKva from v1.0.

maxReactivePower.description: Maximum reactive power injection (leading / over-excited). Typical unit: KiloV-A_Reactive. SunSpec Model 702 maxVar. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.maxQ. Replaces maxReactivePowerKvar from v1.0.

minReactivePower.description: Maximum reactive power absorption (lagging / under-excited). Typical unit: KiloV-A_Reactive. Value is typically negative. SunSpec Model 702 maxVarNeg. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.minQ. Replaces minReactivePowerKvar from v1.0.

rideThroughCategory.description: IEEE 1547-2018 abnormal operating performance category. CategoryI: basic. CategoryII: enhanced for distribution-connected DER. CategoryIII: advanced for large/transmission-connected DER.

operatingMode.description: Inverter grid-interaction mode. GridFollowing: PLL-based sync. GridForming: own V/f reference (microgrid islanding). Standby: energised but not injecting. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.inverterMode.

voltVarEnabled.description: Volt-VAr curve active. IEEE 2030.5 opModVoltVar / SunSpec Model 705.

freqDroopEnabled.description: Frequency-Watt droop active. SunSpec Model 711 / IEEE 1547-2018 Frequency-Watt.

enterServiceRampTimeSec.description: Seconds to ramp from 0 to rated power after reconnection. SunSpec Model 703 ESRmpTms.
